title: Ultra View
description: This modpack enables views like in the popular TikToks/Youtubes with Distant Horizions and Shaders with minimal performance impact.
body:
This modpack enables views like in the popular TikToks/Youtubes with Distant Horizions and Shaders with minimal performance impact.
![The terain generation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e015e8ceefd6dc9cb94d1574c199dd13e1a77c15.jpeg)

Featured Mods:
- Sodium
- Iris
- Distant Horizions
- Zoomify

Recomended Shaders:
- BSL Shaders
- Bliss Shaders
- Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
- Complementary Shaders - Unbound
